A powerful staple for elevated styling and refined avatar looks.

items.description:
Demogorgon

Please use either "Woman Head" OR "Headless Horseman" for the best looking head. (You can layer other accessories over) Thankyou for your purchase!

My personal suggestion is to use this bundle https://www.roblox.com/bundles/239/Woman
Height - 100%
Width - 100%
Head - 100%
Proportions - 0%

For a miniature version, use https://www.roblox.com/bundles/7631/Mini-Woman (use woman head/headless)
